name: commercelead-finder
description: Full-stack lead generation tool for Shopify & WordPress agencies

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup:backend: npm run init-db --prefix backend && npm run seed --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:backend
scripts.postinstall: echo '\n✅ Run: npm run setup to initialize the database\n'
